steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice B (6)
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice B (6):
$$f(6) = 8(2\cdot6 + 2) = 8(12+2) = 8\cdot14 = 112$$
Since 112 ≠ 80, choice B fails.

steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice A (4)
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice A (4):
$$f(4) = 8(2\cdot4 + 2) = 8(8+2) = 8\cdot10 = 80$$
Since 80 = 80, choice A works. That matches choice A — A is correct.
